title: 10 best herbal teas for fluid retention
intro_desc: Herbal teas for fluid retention are natural remedies that help alleviate the condition of excess fluid accumulation in the body. They work by increasing urine production, reducing inflammation, and improving circulation, thereby providing relief from swelling, bloating, and discomfort. The best herbal teas for fluid retention include Juniperus communis, Taraxacum officinale, Astragalus membranaceus, Equisetum arvense, Urtica dioica, Silybum marianum, Cynara scolymus, Verbascum thapsus, Crataegus monogyna, and Verbena officinalis. If left untreated, fluid retention can lead to serious health issues, causing fatigue, joint pain, and respiratory problems, negatively impacting daily life and overall well-being.
